business_ideas.idea: Pack and Ship centers: mailbox rental business model with low unit economics, thousand boxes per location
Distressed asset acquisition: rev-share deals with closing business owners to transfer client base
Modular homes at scale: factory-built homes at 1/3 cost with foundation for faster development
Modular hotel rooms: miniature modular units for hospitality with cost and speed advantages
Tiny homes and micro real estate: small units with attractive unit economics for investors

predictions.text: Boomers retiring will hand off 5-15M revenue businesses with no succession plan, creating acquisition wave
Angel investing requires 20-40 deals to find one winner; most individuals shouldnt start until millionaire
Public market investing without unfair advantage is rigged game; private markets more accessible
